chapter_title.en: The Chapter of Condolences and Grief During Calamities, Visiting Graves, Lamentation and Mourning Gatherings

text: 545 - وَقَالَ أَبُو جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «يُصْنَعُ لِلْمَيِّتِ مَأْتَمٌ ثَلاَثَةَ أَيَّامٍ مِنْ يَوْمَ مَاتَ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.545 - Imam al-Baqir (as) said:
"A mourning gathering (ma'tam) is to be held for the deceased for three days from the day of their death."
